positive: A stylized, seamless repeating pattern featuring minimalist cosmic constellations and celestial bodies. The design incorporates glowing, ethereal lines connecting geometric star clusters and stylized crescent moons. Palette uses deep indigo blue, vibrant sapphire blue, luminous gold, and touches of pearlescent white. Central elements feature a detailed, abstracted nebula swirl surrounded by elegant, thin white line art constellations. The composition must be highly graphic, vector art inspired, suitable for repeating textile print on apparel, with strong contrast and clean edges. Cinematic, symmetrical, high detail, clean lines, flat graphics.
negative: blurry, lowres, noisy, grainy, deformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, border, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, photorealistic, 3d render, artifacts
